required_elements.element: Time of the call recorded (including time of incident, time of dispatch, time of arrival)
Relationship of the parties identified
History of the relationship (include frequency of any violence, intimidation, and threats)
Stalking behaviors articulated (e.g. following, repeated calling, sending unwanted gifts)
Valid protection order in place and verified
All witnesses interviewed and documented
Information about previous incidents documented
Evidence collected
Electronic/technological evidence collected
All incidents of stalking behavior on cell phones, computers, and recording devices captured
Scene(s) concisely described/diagramed
Weapons/objects used
Emotional state of the victim (what they were thinking and feeling)
Evidence of fear articulated in the report
All threats clearly documented
Use of coercion and/or force articulated
All injuries (visible and non-visible) properly documented
Property damage, theft, or burglary documented
Photos taken and details recorded
Victim's report of being strangled (choked) described in detail
Victim's need for medical attention documented
All spontaneous statements captured
Elements of the stalking crime thoroughly articulated
Victim's safety planning documented
Information about obtaining an order of protection provided to the victim
Information about local service providers supplied to the victim
Threat/risk assessment tool utilized with the victim
Use of a stalking kit and/or stalking log discussed with the victim
Suspect's access to weapons documented
Emotional state of the suspect (what they were thinking and feeling)
Suspect's history of protection orders
Suspect's prohibition from possessing firearms due to a conviction for a misdemeanor crime of domestic violence or a qualifying order of protection
Active warrants out for the suspect documented
